# Astronomical Dawn

[Back to all zmanim](index.md)

## Begin Astronomical Twilight

The beginning of [astronomical twilight](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twilight#Astronomical_twilight).

Calculated using a zenith of 108°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginAstronomicalTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginAstronomicalTwilight`

## Begin Civil Twilight

The beginning of [civil twilight](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twilight#Civil_twilight), also described here as dawn.

Calculated using a zenith of 96°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginCivilTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginCivilTwilight`

## Begin Nautical Twilight

The beginning of [nautical twilight](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twilight#Nautical_twilight).

Calculated using a zenith of 102°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginNauticalTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getBeginNauticalTwilight`
